free_text: Effective cross-sections for fission of U-233, U-235,
Pu-239 and Pu-240 by neutrons with energies from 30 keV
Mock fission source for neutrons of about 2MeV,
Sb-Be source for neutrons of about 30 keV,
contamination due to neutrons of ~400 keV is ~ 10%,
Na-D2O source for neutrons of about 250 keV,
Na-Be source for neutrons of about 900 keV,
Po-Be source for neutrons of about 5 MeV,
Filled with 90% Ar and 10% CO(2) at pressure 20mm Hg.
For contamination of U-238 and Pu-240.
For presence of 400 keV neutrons in Sb+Be source <4%.
For anisotropy (< 3.%) and finite size of the sources.
SD: Updated to new date formats,lower case.
Ref. on Engl.transl. of AE added. Subent 5 added.
M.M. Article was checked, BIB information
Primarily measured data were added in Subents 006-008.

sphere 37 mm in diam. and 0.5 mm thick.
